queries: Compare at least two public scientific community or citizen-science repository structures that preserve reproducible data snapshots, evidence provenance, governance documentation, and a clear hackathon or research baseline.

repositories_reviewed.approach: dated public data snapshots with explicit source identity, change caveats, licences, and attribution
README-first public repository orientation and discoverable community-health files
artifact and run provenance
community verification and submission provenance

patterns_adopted: licence deferred until the dependency and provider-rights gate
patterns_rejected: claiming a reproducible baseline before recording tool and upstream versions
selecting a permissive licence before resolving YOLOE obligations
reason: Establish a small, auditable repository boundary before importing contracts or implementing product code.
licence_notes: Strict GitHits query was requested; no result returned before the single attempt was terminated. Fallback sources were official documentation, public repository documentation, and read-only local upstreams. No external code was copied.

queries: Focused initialization pattern for a new public scientific-community repository with README, gitignore, provenance ledger, main default branch, and no premature licence.

repositories_reviewed.approach: plain-language dataset scope and snapshot caveats
README as the public project entry point

patterns_adopted: public scope and non-exhaustiveness language in README
explicit status section that blocks unimplemented claims
AGENTS.md ignored at the user’s direction
patterns_rejected: tracked AGENTS.md after the user explicitly requested it be ignored
reason: Keep the first commit inspectable and scientifically conservative while satisfying the repository-creation contract.
licence_notes: No licence file is created in this subtask. The repository remains all-rights-reserved by default until the Phase 0 licence decision is documented.

queries: Focused reproducible Build Week baseline that distinguishes new repository work from committed and dirty upstream scientific-software state.

repositories_reviewed.approach: schema and manifest inventory separated from uncommitted working-tree state
committed artifact, contract, replay, and provenance inventory
dated snapshots explicitly distinguished from a continuously changing service

patterns_rejected: counting upstream capability as new work
treating uncommitted upstream files as stable artifacts
inferring Apple MPS capability from the Linux creation host
reason: Make competition provenance independently auditable before integration begins.
licence_notes: Inventory only; no upstream source or data is imported and no licence conclusion is inferred from file availability.

queries: Focused append-only provenance ledgers for AI collaboration, commit evidence, requested model usage, human decisions, and review attestations.

repositories_reviewed.approach: separate primary-session, migration, review-attestation, and Build Week delta records
append-only GitHits provenance

patterns_adopted: separation of human decisions from review attestations
patterns_rejected: claiming human review from task authorization alone
claiming runtime model identity without exposed evidence
backfilling a commit SHA before that commit exists
reason: Initialize truthful provenance stores that can be appended after each later commit and task push.
licence_notes: Provenance structure only; no third-party content is copied.

queries: Repository engineering instructions, scientific-software governance, citizen-science safeguards, Indigenous data governance, sensitive-coordinate controls, and accessible evidence interfaces.

repositories_reviewed.approach: discoverable community standards and contribution expectations
authority to control, collective benefit, responsibility, and ethics

repositories_reviewed.repository: Atlas of Living Australia Sensitive Data Service
repositories_reviewed.approach: rules-based generalization of sensitive species data
stable WCAG 2.2 accessibility requirements
verification and reviewer-quality safeguards

patterns_adopted: tracked governance independent of local agent configuration
patterns_rejected: automatic open-data assumptions for Indigenous knowledge
reason: Make product, evidence, community, accessibility, and repository constraints reviewable by contributors and judges.
licence_notes: Governance sources are cited as policies and standards; no external policy text is copied wholesale.

queries: Focused tracked engineering contract covering requested model, GitHits fallback, direct-main workflow, fingerprinting, provider rights, privacy, accessibility, moderation, metrics, and occurrence language while AGENTS.md is ignored.

repositories_reviewed.approach: tracked repository documentation as a public source of project rules
WCAG 2.2 as the stable accessibility target
evidence fingerprints and artifact/run boundary

patterns_rejected: treating a manifest as proof beyond its checks
automatic media upload to model distribution services
reason: Preserve the required engineering rules without violating the user’s explicit AGENTS.md ignore instruction.
licence_notes: No source code or licence text is imported.

queries: Focused community-science safeguards for reviewer dignity, independent blind review, model-vote separation, release gates, First Nations knowledge authority, sensitive locations, moderation, and media takedown.

repositories_reviewed.approach: collective benefit, authority to control, responsibility, and ethics

repositories_reviewed.repository: Atlas of Living Australia Sensitive Data Service
repositories_reviewed.approach: jurisdiction-aware sensitive-data rules and coordinate denaturing
accessible review and moderation controls
blind review, append-only evidence, conflict, and reviewer-quality contracts

reason: Protect participants and evidence integrity while keeping high-impact scientific release accountable.
licence_notes: Policy references are attributed; no external policy or software text is copied wholesale.
